title: Portfolio Analyst
top_reasons: Remote work aligns with location and hybrid preference (remote acceptable) | Role involves analytical evaluation in finance, aligning with candidate's analyst career goals | Salary range is reasonable for analyst-type contract roles
red_flags: Position is contract-based (independent contractor) which conflicts with candidate's full-time employment constraint | Role prefers candidates with advanced degrees (MBA+), candidate holds B.S. only | Job emphasizes finance expert background, candidate has more general analytical and sales experience

title: Treasury Analyst
top_reasons: Role is fully remote, meeting workplace preference as acceptable | Position is full-time, meeting employment type requirement | Salary range $90K-$100K matches expected compensation level | Role involves financial operations with compliance aspects, somewhat aligned with analyst career goals
red_flags: Candidate lacks direct experience in treasury, cash management, or financial operations | Candidate has degree in Computer Science, not Finance or Accounting as preferred | Job requires 2-4+ years relevant experience which candidate lacks | Role may require regulatory specific knowledge like CFTC regulations not indicated in candidate's skills

title: Financial Planning and Analyst (FP&A)
top_reasons: Role is fully remote, acceptable per candidate preference. | Position is an individual contributor analyst role, matching candidate's analyst target roles. | Salary meets or exceeds expectations at around $65K. | No cold calling involved, aligning with candidate's preference against outbound-heavy sales roles.
red_flags: Role requires 12+ years of senior finance experience well beyond candidate's current experience level. | Job focuses heavily on advanced financial modeling and FP&A expertise that candidate lacks. | Role appears very specialized in finance sectors like investment banking, PE, equity research, outside candidate's background in sales and early-stage analytical skills. | Work hours during EST may be inconvenient given candidate's Chicago location, reducing mobility signal.
